transcript.content: Hi, Northwind claims line — this is Quinn. Before anything else, is everyone okay?
Yeah, everyone's fine. I'm pulled over on the shoulder.
Good — I'm glad you're safe. Can I get your name and policy number?
Jordan Reese, policy seven seven four two one zero nine.
Thanks, Jordan — I've pulled up your policy. What happened?
About twenty minutes ago someone rear-ended me at the light on Oak and 3rd. I think it was their fault but I'm not totally sure.
Got it — a rear-end collision at Oak and 3rd, about twenty minutes ago. Did the other driver share their details?
No police. The other driver's name is Sam Avery, I've got their number but not their insurance.
That's fine, Sam Avery's number is enough for now. Is your vehicle drivable?
Rear bumper's crunched but it still drives.
Okay. I've filed your claim — your claim id is NW-2026-018472, and an adjuster will call you within about two hours at this number. Anything else?

evaluator_results.name: no_premium_speculation
evaluator_results.notes: deflected the rental + premium questions to the adjuster.
